Several formulas and captions compete for the same fixed-frame regions.

Scale long MathTex expressions to a bounded width.

Run Manim after local dependencies are installed, then rerun video review.

generated_code.code:
from manim import *

class CreateAnEpicRigorousCinematic3dMathToScene(ThreeDScene):
    def construct(self):
        self.camera.background_color = "#fff8ea"
        ink = "#172033"
        blue = "#1d4ed8"
        orange = "#f97316"
        green = "#16a34a"
        teal = "#0f766e"
        gold = "#ca8a04"
        magenta = "#c026d3"

        self.set_camera_orientation(phi=62 * DEGREES, theta=-42 * DEGREES, zoom=0.82)

        axes = ThreeDAxes(
            x_range=[-3, 3, 1], y_range=[-3, 3, 1], z_range=[-3, 3, 1],
            x_length=5.8, y_length=5.8, z_length=5.8,
            axis_config={"color": ink, "stroke_width": 2},
        )
        x_lab = Text("x", font_size=22, color=ink).move_to(axes.c2p(3.25, 0, 0))
        y_lab = Text("y", font_size=22, color=ink).move_to(axes.c2p(0, 3.25, 0))
        t_lab = Text("ct", font_size=22, color=ink).move_to(axes.c2p(0, 0, 3.25))

        title = Text(
            "Quantum Field Theory",
            font_size=44,
            weight=BOLD,
            color=ink,
        ).to_edge(UP).shift(0.25 * DOWN)
        subtitle = Text(
            "A journey into the electromagnetic interaction",
            font_size=24,
            color=blue,
        ).next_to(title, DOWN, buff=0.16)
        title_group = VGroup(title, subtitle)
        self.add_fixed_in_frame_mobjects(title_group)

        def cone_surface(sign, color):
            return Surface(
                lambda u, v: axes.c2p(u * np.cos(v), u * np.sin(v), sign * u),
                u_range=[0.0, 2.45], v_range=[0, TAU],
                resolution=(18, 48),
                fill_color=color, fill_opacity=0.22,
                stroke_color=color, stroke_width=1.0,
            )

        future_cone = cone_surface(1, blue)
        past_cone = cone_surface(-1, blue)
        origin = Dot3D(axes.c2p(0, 0, 0), radius=0.07, color=orange)
        formula = MathTex(
            r"ds^2=-c^2dt^2+dx^2+dy^2+dz^2",
            font_size=36,
            color=ink,
        ).to_edge(DOWN).shift(0.15 * UP)
        self.add_fixed_in_frame_mobjects(formula)
        metric_note = Text(
            "The minus sign makes causality geometric.",
            font_size=24,
            color=blue,
        ).next_to(formula, UP, buff=0.18)
        self.add_fixed_in_frame_mobjects(metric_note)

        self.play(FadeIn(title_group), run_time=1.2)
        self.play(Create(axes), FadeIn(x_lab), FadeIn(y_lab), FadeIn(t_lab), run_time=1.6)
        self.play(GrowFromCenter(origin), Create(future_cone), Create(past_cone), run_time=2.2)
        self.begin_ambient_camera_rotation(rate=0.16)
        self.play(Write(formula), FadeIn(metric_note, shift=0.2 * UP), run_time=2.0)
        self.wait(1.0)

        event_text = Text("events inside the cone can exchange signals", font_size=24, color=ink).to_corner(UL).shift(0.2 * DOWN)
        self.add_fixed_in_frame_mobjects(event_text)
        light_ray = Line3D(axes.c2p(0, 0, 0), axes.c2p(1.8, 0, 1.8), color=gold, thickness=0.025)
        timelike = Line3D(axes.c2p(0, 0, 0), axes.c2p(0.35, 0.25, 2.2), color=green, thickness=0.025)
        spacelike = Line3D(axes.c2p(0, 0, 0), axes.c2p(2.4, 1.1, 0.35), color=magenta, thickness=0.025)
        self.play(FadeIn(event_text), Create(light_ray), Create(timelike), Create(spacelike), run_time=2.3)
        self.wait(1.0)

        self.stop_ambient_camera_rotation()
        self.move_camera(phi=70 * DEGREES, theta=-64 * DEGREES, zoom=1.05, run_time=1.8)
        self.play(FadeOut(event_text), FadeOut(metric_note), formula.animate.scale(0.82).to_corner(DL), run_time=1.1)

        phase = ValueTracker(0)
        z_axis = Arrow3D(axes.c2p(0, 0, -2.8), axes.c2p(0, 0, 2.8), color=ink, thickness=0.018)
        e_wave = always_redraw(lambda: ParametricFunction(
            lambda s: axes.c2p(0.58 * np.sin(3.2 * s + phase.get_value()), 0, s),
            t_range=[-2.6, 2.6], color=blue, stroke_width=5,
        ))
        b_wave = always_redraw(lambda: ParametricFunction(
            lambda s: axes.c2p(0, 0.58 * np.cos(3.2 * s + phase.get_value()), s),
            t_range=[-2.6, 2.6], color=teal, stroke_width=5,
        ))
        e_label = Text("E field", font_size=24, color=blue).to_corner(UR).shift(0.35 * DOWN)
        b_label = Text("B field", font_size=24, color=teal).next_to(e_label, DOWN, buff=0.12)
        self.add_fixed_in_frame_mobjects(e_label, b_label)
        maxwell = MathTex(
            r"\nabla\times\vec B=\mu_0\epsilon_0\frac{\partial\vec E}{\partial t}",
            font_size=32,
            color=ink,
        ).to_edge(DOWN)
        self.add_fixed_in_frame_mobjects(maxwell)
        self.play(FadeOut(future_cone), FadeOut(past_cone), FadeOut(light_ray), FadeOut(timelike), FadeOut(spacelike), Create(z_axis), run_time=1.2)
        self.play(Create(e_wave), Create(b_wave), FadeIn(e_label), FadeIn(b_label), Transform(formula, maxwell), run_time=2.0)
        self.play(phase.animate.set_value(TAU), run_time=3.5, rate_func=linear)
        self.wait(0.6)

        tensor = MathTex(
            r"\partial_\mu F^{\mu\nu}=\mu_0J^\nu",
            font_size=40,
            color=ink,
        ).to_edge(DOWN)
        self.add_fixed_in_frame_mobjects(tensor)
        tensor_panel = Rectangle(width=5.6, height=3.0, color=gold, fill_color="#fff2b8", fill_opacity=0.62).move_to(axes.c2p(0, -1.1, 0.25)).rotate(68 * DEGREES, axis=RIGHT)
        tensor_words = Text("one tensor carries E and B together", font_size=24, color=gold).to_corner(UL).shift(0.2 * DOWN)
        self.add_fixed_in_frame_mobjects(tensor_words)
        self.play(FadeOut(e_label), FadeOut(b_label), FadeIn(tensor_panel), Transform(formula, tensor), FadeIn(tensor_words), run_time=1.9)
        self.move_camera(phi=58 * DEGREES, theta=-18 * DEGREES, zoom=0.95, run_time=1.8)
        self.wait(0.8)

        lagrangian = MathTex(
            r"\mathcal L_{QED}=\bar\psi(i\gamma^\mu D_\mu-m)\psi-\frac14F_{\mu\nu}F^{\mu\nu}",
            font_size=31,
            color=ink,
        ).to_edge(DOWN)
        self.add_fixed_in_frame_mobjects(lagrangian)
        parts = VGroup(
            Text("spinor matter", font_size=22, color=orange),
            Text("covariant derivative", font_size=22, color=green),
            Text("gamma structure", font_size=22, color=teal),
            Text("photon field", font_size=22, color=gold),
        ).arrange(DOWN, aligned_edge=LEFT, buff=0.12).to_corner(UR).shift(0.2 * DOWN)
        self.add_fixed_in_frame_mobjects(parts)
        electron = Sphere(radius=0.18, color=orange).move_to(axes.c2p(-1.5, -0.65, 0.4))
        photon = ParametricFunction(lambda s: axes.c2p(s, -0.65 + 0.22 * np.sin(8 * s), 0.4), t_range=[-1.1, 1.1], color=gold, stroke_width=5)
        electron2 = Sphere(radius=0.18, color=orange).move_to(axes.c2p(1.5, -0.65, 0.4))
        self.play(Transform(formula, lagrangian), FadeIn(parts), FadeIn(electron), Create(photon), FadeIn(electron2), FadeOut(tensor_words), run_time=2.2)
        self.play(Rotate(photon, angle=0.35, axis=OUT), electron.animate.shift(0.35 * RIGHT), electron2.animate.shift(0.35 * LEFT), run_time=1.5)
        self.wait(0.7)

        gauge = MathTex(r"\psi\to e^{i\alpha(x)}\psi", font_size=38, color=green).to_edge(DOWN)
        self.add_fixed_in_frame_mobjects(gauge)
        ring = Torus(major_radius=1.0, minor_radius=0.025, color=green).move_to(axes.c2p(0, 0, 0.2))
        self.play(Transform(formula, gauge), Create(ring), FadeOut(parts), run_time=1.6)
        self.play(Rotate(ring, angle=TAU, axis=UP), run_time=2.4, rate_func=smooth)

        rg_axes = Axes(x_range=[0, 5, 1], y_range=[0, 2.2, 1], x_length=4.3, y_length=2.3, axis_config={"color": ink}).to_edge(RIGHT).shift(0.3 * LEFT)
        rg_curve = rg_axes.plot(lambda x: 0.45 + 0.18 * x + 0.035 * x * x, x_range=[0, 4.5], color=magenta, stroke_width=5)
        rg_label = MathTex(r"\frac{d\alpha}{d\ln\mu}=\beta(\alpha)", font_size=34, color=magenta).to_corner(UL).shift(0.1 * DOWN)
        self.add_fixed_in_frame_mobjects(rg_axes, rg_curve, rg_label)
        self.play(FadeOut(ring), FadeOut(electron), FadeOut(electron2), FadeOut(photon), FadeIn(rg_axes), Create(rg_curve), Transform(formula, rg_label), run_time=2.1)
        self.wait(1.0)

        takeaway = Text(
            "Geometry earns the symbols: spacetime shapes light, symmetry shapes interaction.",
            font_size=28,
            color=ink,
            line_spacing=0.9,
        ).scale_to_fit_width(6.6).to_edge(DOWN)
        self.add_fixed_in_frame_mobjects(takeaway)
        final = VGroup(
            Text("QED", font_size=54, weight=BOLD, color=ink),
            Text("matter, light, and gauge symmetry in one language", font_size=24, color=blue),
            Text("Finis.", font_size=30, color=magenta),
        ).arrange(DOWN, buff=0.18).move_to(ORIGIN)
        self.add_fixed_in_frame_mobjects(final)
        self.play(FadeOut(formula), FadeOut(rg_axes), FadeOut(rg_curve), FadeOut(axes), FadeOut(x_lab), FadeOut(y_lab), FadeOut(t_lab), FadeOut(z_axis), FadeOut(e_wave), FadeOut(b_wave), FadeOut(tensor_panel), FadeOut(title_group), run_time=1.4)
        self.play(FadeIn(final), Write(takeaway), run_time=2.0)
        self.wait(1.5)

metadata.notes: Implements a compact cinematic 3D QED explainer with visual metaphor before notation, off-white background, readable fixed-frame formulas, light cone, EM wave, tensor, Lagrangian, gauge phase, Feynman-style exchange, and RG flow. Uses only Manim CE primitives and no file, network, or external assets.
